---
title: "Ports of animation examples — animint2 Gallery"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: false
    css: style.css
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, results="asis", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  if (requireNamespace("data.table", quietly=TRUE)) {
    library(data.table)
    meta       <- tryCatch(fread("meta.csv"),       error=function(e) data.table())
    error_meta <- tryCatch(fread("error.csv"),      error=function(e) data.table())
  } else {
    meta       <- tryCatch(read.csv("meta.csv",  stringsAsFactors=FALSE), error=function(e) data.frame())
    error_meta <- tryCatch(read.csv("error.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE), error=function(e) data.frame())
  }
})
```

<div class="hero">
  <h1>Ports of animation examples</h1>
  <p>animint2 ports of the <a href="https://yihui.org/animation/examples/" target="_blank">animation package</a> — interactive statistical visualizations &nbsp;·&nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/tdhock/animint/wiki/Ports-of-animation-examples" target="_blank">wiki page</a></p>
</div>

```{r stats}
cat(paste0(
  "<div class=\"stats-box\">",
  "<p class=\"stats-number\">", nrow(meta), "</p>",
  "<p class=\"stats-label\">Interactive Visualizations</p>",
  "</div>"
))
```

<p class="section-label">&#11088; Your Contribution</p>
<div class="viz-grid">

```{r yours}
if (nrow(meta) > 0 && "viz_owner_repo" %in% names(meta)) {
  mine <- meta[grepl("Nishita-shah1", meta$viz_owner_repo, ignore.case=TRUE), ]
  if (nrow(mine) > 0) {
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(mine))) {
      row    <- mine[i, ]
      owner  <- sub("/.*", "", row$viz_owner_repo)
      repo   <- sub(".*/", "", row$viz_owner_repo)
      imgp   <- paste0("repos/", gsub("/", "_", row$viz_owner_repo), ".png")
      vizurl <- paste0("https://", owner, ".github.io/", repo, "/")
      repurl <- paste0("https://github.com/", row$viz_owner_repo)
      srcurl <- if ("source" %in% names(row) && nchar(row$source) > 0) row$source else repurl
      cat(paste0(
        "<div class=\"viz-card mine-card\">",
        "<div class=\"mine-banner\">&#9733; Your Contribution</div>",
        "<a href=\"", vizurl, "\" target=\"_blank\">",
        "<img src=\"", imgp, "\" class=\"viz-image\" alt=\"", row$title, "\"",
        " onerror=\"this.src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/", row$viz_owner_repo, "/gh-pages/Capture.PNG'\"/>",
        "</a>",
        "<div class=\"viz-content\">",
        "<h3 class=\"viz-title\">", row$title, "</h3>",
        "<p class=\"viz-author\">Nishita Shah</p>",
        "<div class=\"viz-links\">",
        "<a href=\"", vizurl, "\" target=\"_blank\">View Live</a>",
        "<a href=\"", repurl, "\" target=\"_blank\">Repository</a>",
        "<a href=\"", srcurl, "\" target=\"_blank\">Source Code</a>",
        "</div></div></div>"
      ))
    }
  } else {
    cat("<p class=\"empty-note\">No contribution found — ensure repos.txt contains Nishita-shah1/bisection-animint</p>")
  }
}
```

</div>

<p class="section-label">&#128202; All Ports</p>
<div class="viz-grid">

```{r others}
if (nrow(meta) > 0 && "viz_owner_repo" %in% names(meta)) {
  others <- meta[!grepl("Nishita-shah1", meta$viz_owner_repo, ignore.case=TRUE), ]
  if (nrow(others) > 0) {
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(others))) {
      row    <- others[i, ]
      owner  <- sub("/.*", "", row$viz_owner_repo)
      repo   <- sub(".*/", "", row$viz_owner_repo)
      imgp   <- paste0("repos/", gsub("/", "_", row$viz_owner_repo), ".png")
      vizurl <- paste0("https://", owner, ".github.io/", repo, "/")
      repurl <- paste0("https://github.com/", row$viz_owner_repo)
      srcurl <- if ("source" %in% names(row) && nchar(row$source) > 0) row$source else repurl
      cat(paste0(
        "<div class=\"viz-card\">",
        "<a href=\"", vizurl, "\" target=\"_blank\">",
        "<img src=\"", imgp, "\" class=\"viz-image\" alt=\"", row$title, "\"",
        " onerror=\"this.src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/", row$viz_owner_repo, "/gh-pages/Capture.PNG'\"/>",
        "</a>",
        "<div class=\"viz-content\">",
        "<h3 class=\"viz-title\">", row$title, "</h3>",
        "<p class=\"viz-author\">", owner, "</p>",
        "<div class=\"viz-links\">",
        "<a href=\"", vizurl, "\" target=\"_blank\">View Live</a>",
        "<a href=\"", repurl, "\" target=\"_blank\">Repository</a>",
        "<a href=\"", srcurl, "\" target=\"_blank\">Source Code</a>",
        "</div></div></div>"
      ))
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

```{r errors}
if (nrow(error_meta) > 0) {
  cat("<p class=\"section-label\">&#9888; Missing Screenshots</p>")
  cat("<div class=\"error-grid\">")
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(error_meta))) {
    row    <- error_meta[i, ]
    or     <- if ("viz_owner_repo" %in% names(row)) row$viz_owner_repo else ""
    owner  <- sub("/.*", "", or)
    repo   <- sub(".*/", "", or)
    vizurl <- paste0("https://", owner, ".github.io/", repo, "/")
    errmsg <- if ("error" %in% names(row)) row$error else "unknown error"
    cat(paste0(
      "<div class=\"error-card\">",
      "<span class=\"err-icon\">&#9888;</span>",
      "<div><a href=\"", vizurl, "\" target=\"_blank\">", or, "</a>",
      "<span class=\"err-msg\"> — ", errmsg, "</span></div>",
      "</div>"
    ))
  }
  cat("</div>")
}
```

<div class="footer">
  <p>Built with <a href="https://github.com/animint/animint2" target="_blank">animint2</a> &nbsp;|&nbsp; <a href="meta.csv">Download meta.csv</a> &nbsp;|&nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/tdhock/animint/wiki/Ports-of-animation-examples" target="_blank">Wiki page</a></p>
</div>
